narrative:
Perry / Pike (precinct in Coshocton County) has 871 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.8 percentage points.
